msg_idle_warning: %s in %d seconds. Move the mouse or press any key to cancel.
cli_usage:
Usage: IdleTrigger <command>

Commands:
  sleep        Enter sleep
  hibernate    Enter hibernation
  shutdown     Shut down Windows
  lock         Lock the workstation
  nosleep      Stay Awake (on|off|toggle|status)
  monitor      Idle monitor (on|off|status)
  autostart    Start with Windows (enable|disable|status)
  config:reload Reload the running tray configuration
  status       Show current status
  version      Show version
cli_error_sleep_unavailable: Sleep is not available on this system.
cli_error_hibernate_unavailable: Hibernation is not available on this system.
cli_error_tray_not_running: The tray application is not running.
cli_error_nosleep_requires_tray: Stay Awake requires the tray application to remain running.
cli_error_monitor_requires_tray: The idle monitor requires the tray application to remain running.
warning_config_defaults: Warning: failed to load the configuration; using defaults:
config_edit_hint: Edit this file, then restart IdleTrigger or run config:reload.
cli_unknown: Unknown command. Run without arguments to start the tray icon.
tip_lock: Lock the current Windows session immediately.
tip_sleep: Put the system to sleep immediately. This fails if sleep is unavailable.
tip_hibernate: Hibernate the system immediately. Windows hibernation must be enabled.
tip_shutdown: Shut down Windows immediately. Save your work first.
tip_restart: Restart Windows immediately. Save your work first.
tip_nosleep: Prevent automatic system sleep. Configure keep_screen_on and battery policy in the config file.
tip_process_watch: Keep awake while selected apps run. Add exe names to process_watch_list in the config file.
tip_idle: Run the selected action after the idle timeout. This is mutually exclusive with Stay Awake.
tip_idle_timeout: Choose how long the system must be idle before the idle action runs.
tip_idle_action: Choose whether idle timeout triggers sleep, hibernate, shut down, or lock.
tip_theme: Automatically switch Windows light/dark theme by fixed time or sunrise/sunset. Mode and coordinates are in the config file.
tip_fullscreen: Pause automatic theme switching while a fullscreen app is active.
tip_battery_theme: Switch to dark mode on battery and restore by schedule when AC power returns.
tip_theme_switch: Switch once between light and dark theme now.
tip_theme_repair: Re-broadcast theme changes when some windows or displays did not refresh.
tip_hotkeys: Enable global hotkeys: Win+Shift+S sleep, Win+Shift+L lock, Win+Shift+N toggle Stay Awake.
tip_autostart: Start in the tray after Windows sign-in. The startup path is repaired automatically.
tip_logging: Write debug logs to IdleTrigger.log. Enable while diagnosing issues; keep off otherwise.
tip_language: Change the interface language. The choice is saved to the config file.
tip_config: Open IdleTrigger.toml in Notepad. Advanced settings such as process lists, theme mode, and coordinates are edited there.
tip_exit: Exit the tray app and stop Stay Awake, idle monitoring, hotkeys, and theme scheduling.
